text:
(In reply to Sunpoet Po-Chuan Hsieh from comment #1) > Would you please drop a message from your previous email address > (cjpugmed@gmail.com) to confirm this change? Thanks. MIME-Version: 1.0 Received: by 10.220.131.202 with HTTP; Fri, 22 Aug 2014 03:46:07 -0700 (PDT) Date: Fri, 22 Aug 2014 12:46:07 +0200 Delivered-To: cjpugmed@gmail.com Message-ID: Subject: Bug 192902 - [PATCH] change mantainer's email address for multiple ports From: Carlos Jacobo Puga Medina To: "bug-followup@freebsd.org" Content-Type: multipart/alternative; boundary=001a11c21f8668edad0501358baa --001a11c21f8668edad0501358baa Content-Type: text/plain; charset=UTF-8 Done! --001a11c21f8668edad0501358baa Content-Type: text/html; charset=UTF-8
Done!
--001a11c21f8668edad0501358baa--
